header.class: bg-anturun text-white sticky top-0 z-40 shadow-sm

div.class: container mx-auto max-w-4xl px-3 py-3 flex items-center justify-between gap-3

a.class: text-white font-bold text-lg md:text-xl tracking-wide truncate flex-shrink-0 max-w-[100px] md:max-w-[200px]

form.class: flex-grow flex items-center bg-white rounded-sm px-2 py-1 border border-transparent focus-within:border-orange-200 transition-colors

input.class: w-full outline-none text-sm text-gray-800 bg-transparent py-0.5
input.name: q

button.class: text-gray-400 hover:text-anturun ml-1 p-1 flex-shrink-0 cursor-pointer outline-none
relative text-white flex-shrink-0 p-1 cursor-pointer

span.class: cart-badge absolute -top-1 -right-1 bg-white text-anturun text-xxs font-bold px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full border border-anturun

div.class: w-11 h-11 bg-orange-100 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-2xl shadow-inner
w-11 h-11 bg-blue-100 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-2xl shadow-inner
w-11 h-11 bg-yellow-100 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-2xl shadow-inner
w-11 h-11 bg-green-100 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-2xl shadow-inner
w-11 h-11 bg-pink-100 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-2xl shadow-inner
w-11 h-11 bg-red-100 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-2xl shadow-inner text-anturun

span.class: text-xs mt-1.5 text-gray-700 text-center leading-tight font-bold

div.class: px-2 py-2 flex items-center justify-between bg-white md:bg-transparent md:px-0

h2.class: text-anturun font-bold text-sm uppercase tracking-wide flex items-center

div.class: hidden bg-white p-4 rounded-sm shadow-sm mb-4 mx-2 md:mx-0 items-center gap-4 border-l-4 border-anturun transition-all
w-14 h-14 bg-orange-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-2xl shadow-inner flex-shrink-0 border border-orange-200

h2.class: text-lg md:text-xl font-bold text-gray-800 leading-tight mb-1

span.class: text-[10px] font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-sm inline-block hidden

div.class: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-2 px-2 md:px-0 pb-4
bg-white md:rounded-sm md:shadow-sm md:mt-4 p-4 min-h-[60vh]

a.class: px-4 py-2 bg-white border border-gray-300 text-gray-600 text-sm rounded-sm hover:bg-gray-50 shadow-sm
px-4 py-2 bg-white border border-gray-300 text-gray-600 text-sm rounded-sm hover:bg-gray-50 shadow-sm

article.class: bg-white rounded-sm shadow-sm border border-gray-100 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-anturun hover:shadow-md transition-all relative flex flex-col post-container-parse

div.class: absolute top-0 left-0 bg-anturun text-white text-[10px] px-2 py-0.5 z-20 rounded-br-lg font-bold shadow-sm flex items-center
absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center text-gray-400 text-xs
sc-overlay-tutup absolute inset-0 bg-black/60 z-20 hidden items-center justify-center

span.class: bg-gray-800 text-white font-bold px-3 py-1 rounded-sm text-xs border border-gray-600 shadow-sm

div.class: p-2 flex flex-col flex-grow z-20 pointer-events-none

h2.class: text-xs md:text-sm text-gray-800 line-clamp-2 leading-tight min-h-[32px] mb-1

div.class: sc-hargacoret-container hidden items-center text-gray-400 text-[9px] line-through mb-0.5
text-anturun text-sm md:text-base font-semibold flex items-start
px-2 pb-2 mt-1 z-30 flex items-center justify-between border-t border-gray-50 pt-2

button.class: btn-add-cart bg-orange-50 text-anturun border border-anturun hover:bg-anturun hover:text-white rounded-sm p-1 transition-colors flex items-center cursor-pointer

div.class: w-full bg-gray-100 relative max-h-[400px] flex justify-center

span.class: ml-2 bg-red-100 text-anturun text-[10px] font-bold px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-sm border border-red-200

div.class: text-anturun text-2xl font-bold mb-2 flex items-start
p-4 bg-white mt-2 border-y border-gray-100 md:border-none

span.class: bg-gray-50 text-gray-600 text-[11px] px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full border border-gray-200

div.class: text-sm text-gray-700 bg-orange-50/50 p-3 rounded-sm border-l-2 border-anturun
div.p: Tidak ada ringkasan yang tersedia untuk produk ini.

div.class: p-4 flex items-center gap-3 bg-white border-b border-gray-100 md:border-none mb-24 md:mb-4
w-14 h-14 bg-gray-200 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-2xl shadow-inner border border-gray-300

button.class: border border-anturun text-anturun px-3 py-1.5 rounded-sm text-xs font-medium hover:bg-orange-50 transition cursor-pointer

div.class: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-white border-t border-gray-200 flex z-40 md:sticky md:bottom-auto md:mt-4 md:rounded-sm shadow-[0_-2px_10px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)]

button.class: btn-add-cart w-1/2 bg-orange-50 text-anturun hover:bg-orange-100 font-bold py-3.5 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5
btn-beli-sekarang w-1/2 bg-anturun hover:bg-anturunhover text-white font-bold py-3.5 transition-colors flex flex-col items-center justify-center

nav.class: fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full bg-white border-t border-gray-200 flex justify-between px-2 py-1.5 z-30 md:hidden pb-safe

a.class: flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-anturun
flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-gray-400 hover:text-anturun

button.class: flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-gray-400 hover:text-anturun relative

span.class: cart-badge absolute top-0 right-3 bg-anturun text-white text-[8px] font-bold px-1 py-0.5 rounded-full

button.class: flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-gray-400 hover:text-anturun

div.class: fixed inset-0 z-[100] bg-black/60 hidden flex-col justify-end transition-opacity
bg-background w-full h-[85vh] md:max-h-[85vh] md:max-w-md md:mx-auto rounded-t-xl flex flex-col shadow-2xl relative translate-y-full transition-transform duration-300 overflow-hidden
w-12 h-1.5 bg-gray-200 rounded-full mx-auto mt-2
px-4 pb-3 pt-2 flex justify-between items-center

button.class: text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600 bg-gray-100 rounded-full p-1 border-none outline-none

div.span: Klik di sini untuk mengisi alamat pengiriman & data penerima.

label.class: flex items-center justify-between cursor-pointer border border-gray-200 p-3 rounded-sm hover:border-anturun
flex items-center justify-between cursor-pointer border border-gray-200 p-3 rounded-sm hover:border-anturun
label.span: Transfer Bank / QRIS Kode QR akan muncul setelah klik Buat Pesanan

label.class: text-gray-800 text-sm font-bold flex justify-between items-center mb-2

input.class: w-full bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded-sm px-3 py-2 outline-none focus:border-anturun text-sm
input.placeholder: Cth: Pedas manis, jangan pakai seledri...

label.class: text-gray-800 text-sm font-bold flex justify-between items-center mb-2

input.class: w-full bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded-sm px-3 py-2 outline-none focus:border-anturun text-sm uppercase transition

button.class: bg-gray-800 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-sm text-sm font-medium hover:bg-black transition whitespace-nowrap

h4.class: font-bold text-gray-800 text-sm mb-2 flex items-center gap-1

div.class: flex justify-between text-xs text-anturun font-medium hidden
border-t border-dashed border-gray-200 pt-3 mt-1 flex justify-between items-center
bg-white border-t p-3 flex justify-between items-center flex-shrink-0 z-20

button.class: bg-anturun hover:bg-anturunhover text-white font-bold py-3 px-8 rounded-sm shadow-sm transition

div.class: fixed inset-0 z-[110] bg-black/60 hidden flex-col justify-end transition-opacity
bg-gray-100 w-full h-[85vh] md:max-h-[85vh] md:max-w-md md:mx-auto rounded-t-2xl flex flex-col shadow-2xl relative translate-y-full transition-transform duration-300 overflow-hidden
bg-white border-b rounded-t-2xl z-10 shadow-sm flex-shrink-0
w-12 h-1.5 bg-gray-200 rounded-full mx-auto mt-2
px-4 pb-3 pt-2 flex justify-between items-center

button.class: text-gray-400 hover:text-anturun mr-1 border-none outline-none

div.class: bg-white p-4 rounded-sm shadow-sm border border-gray-200
div.p: Pastikan data yang Anda masukkan benar agar kurir mudah menemukan lokasi Anda.

button.class: flex-1 py-2 px-1 truncate text-xs font-bold rounded-sm border border-anturun bg-anturun text-white shadow-sm transition outline-none
flex-1 py-2 px-1 truncate text-xs font-bold rounded-sm border border-gray-300 bg-white text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50 transition outline-none
flex-1 py-2 px-1 truncate text-xs font-bold rounded-sm border border-gray-300 bg-white text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50 transition outline-none

input.class: w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-sm px-3 py-2.5 outline-none focus:border-anturun
w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-sm px-3 py-2.5 outline-none focus:border-anturun
w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-sm px-3 py-2.5 outline-none focus:border-anturun

textarea.class: w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-sm px-3 py-2.5 outline-none focus:border-anturun
textarea.placeholder: Nama Jalan, RT/RW, Kecamatan, Kota, Patokan Rumah (Cth: Pagar Hitam depan Warung)

label.class: block text-gray-500 mb-1 text-xs flex justify-between items-center

button.class: text-anturun font-medium bg-orange-50 px-2 py-1 rounded

div.class: mb-2 text-[11px] font-bold text-anturun flex justify-between bg-orange-50 p-2 rounded border border-orange-100
w-full h-48 border border-gray-300 rounded-sm mb-2 relative z-0

input.class: w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-sm px-3 py-2.5 outline-none text-[10px] text-gray-500 bg-gray-50
input.placeholder: Link koordinat akan tampil di sini...

button.class: w-full bg-anturun hover:bg-anturunhover text-white font-bold py-3.5 rounded-sm shadow-sm transition border-none outline-none

div.class: fixed inset-0 z-[120] bg-black/60 hidden flex-col justify-center items-center transition-opacity p-4
bg-white w-full max-w-sm rounded-xl flex flex-col shadow-2xl relative p-6 text-center transform transition-transform scale-100
mx-auto flex justify-center items-center mb-3 p-3 border-2 border-dashed border-gray-300 rounded-xl bg-gray-50 min-h-[220px] min-w-[220px]

button.class: mb-4 bg-anturun text-white px-5 py-2.5 rounded-md shadow-sm text-xs font-bold flex items-center justify-center mx-auto hover:bg-anturunhover transition border-none outline-none

div.p: Pastikan nominal yang muncul di aplikasi pembayaran sesuai sebelum Anda memasukkan PIN.

button.class: w-1/3 border border-gray-300 text-gray-600 rounded-sm py-2.5 text-sm font-bold hover:bg-gray-50 transition
w-2/3 bg-anturun hover:bg-anturunhover text-white rounded-sm py-2.5 text-sm font-bold transition
